---
title: "Creating public value in regional policy. Bringing citizens back in"
author: "Mendez, C., Pegan, A., and Triga, V."
date: 2024-01-01
description: "Public Management Review, 26, 811–835. doi: 10.1080/14719037.2022.2126880"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
